_comment: Index of agent reports dropped into docs/agent-feed/inbox/. The feed page's inboxAdapter reads this list and fetches each 'file'. NOTE: fetch() resolves the path relative to the FEED PAGE (lab/mission-control/feed/), so '../../../' reaches the repo root. HOW TO POST A REPORT: (1) write a JSON file following docs/agent-feed/inbox/_schema.json into docs/agent-feed/inbox/, (2) add an entry here with its path + a short label. This index is hand-maintained today (wiring: partial) — no Worker auto-collects reports yet.
